items.title: The State of the Union brings a big audience for Trump. But does it matter?
items.description: In the age of algorithm-driven social media feeds, the audience for the speech is increasingly fragmented and entrenched in their political positions.

items.title: U.S. women’s hockey team declines Trump’s State of the Union invitation
items.description: The players “were honored to be included and are grateful for the acknowledgement,” according to a team statement.

items.title: Trump’s top general foresees acute risks in an attack on Iran
items.description: The Joint Chiefs of Staff chairman has said that a lack of munitions and allied support could mean greater danger for U.S. troops, people familiar wit...

items.title: Coast Guard investigating swastika found at recruit training center
items.description: The incident follows a controversy last year when officials temporarily downgraded the hate symbol to “potentially divisive” in the service’s workplac...

items.title: Trump again centers crime in immigration debate with White House vigil
items.description: The vigil centered victims’ families and crime in defense of the president’s deportation campaign, even as public support for his approach softens.
